ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-23-2008 IN 220. THIS CAUSE CAME ON FOR HEARING ON DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER'S OBJECTIONS TO CCP 1048(A) CONSOLIDATION OF CASES. GIL PURCELL, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFFS, JAMES PARKER, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER. THE COURT ISSUED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONSOLIDATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1048(A) IS ORDERED VACATED. THIS RULING BECOMES THE FINAL RULING AFTER 10 DAYS UNLESS THERE ARE ANY OBJECTIONS BROUGHT BEFORE THE COURT PRIOR TO SAID 10 DAYS. JUDGE ROBERTSON; CLERKS: C.LI/D.LOKS; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY #8098 (220)
